label: sandbox • author a plugin, register it, then CALL it and use its output
query: Create a sandbox plugin with plugin id 'mathkit' that exposes one tool with tool id 'square': it takes a number parameter and prints its square. Author the files under plugins/mathkit/ (helper script plus plugin.json, following the plugin-building guide in your instructions), register it with sandbox_plugin_register, then CALL the newly registered mathkit_square tool with the number 12 — it is callable immediately even though it is not in your visible tool list — and write the tool's output to plugin_out.txt in your home directory.
notes: Effectiveness, not just registration: the registered {pluginId}_{toolId} tool must be invoked in the same run and its REAL output (144) pinned via the home mount. The runner uninstalls the plugin and unregisters its tools after the case.
